goalText: Implement the verifier-loop CLI (Rust, two binaries verifier-loop/jewilo + verifier-verdict/jewije) per openspec/changes/add-verifier-loop-cli/. Verify completion: (1) run `cargo build --release` - must succeed with zero errors (build cache is already warm). (2) run `cargo test --release` - all tests must pass. (3) confirm both `jewilo` and `jewije` are on PATH. (4) coverage >=80% lines (report at flow/proof/coverage_report.txt shows 93.16%). (5) the 6 OpenSpec specs are implemented across src/ modules: store (salt+config), goal (lifecycle immutability via salted signature), acp (parser+adapters), spawn (parallel orchestration+timeout), verdict (first-final+notes-required+env-derived-slot), consensus (n/m + tamper-evident vl: hash), prompt (blind+frozen artifacts), cli (NEW/RESUME wiring). When satisfied with the evidence, register your verdict by running: jewije approve --notes "<summarize the evidence you checked>". If any check genuinely fails, run: jewije reject --notes "<what failed and why>". Be concise in your verification - do not over-investigate; the build cache is warm so cargo commands are fast.
context: Self-verify: jewilo verifies its own implementation via real pi -p --mode json backend. Build cache warm.
